name: Oysters Rockerfeller
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Stick Unsalted Butter, at room temperature
Fresh Ground Black Pepper -- to taste
12 Fresh Oysters, on the half shell
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler. Place the broiler rack 3 to 4 inches from the heat.
2. In a food processor, puree together butter, bread crumbs, scallions, celery,
tarragon, salt, black pepper, and cayenne until smooth.
3. Using a small sharp knife, carefully cut under each oyster to release it
from its shell.
4. Place each oyster on its half-shell side on a baking sheet. Spoon some of the
pureed mixture onto each oyster.
5. Broil for 2 to 3 minutes until golden and crisp. Serve immediately.
Yield: 2 servings
